title: DNA extraction for fermented plant based foods
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"biucl","text":"Disinfect mortar and pestle with 70% ethanol in between samples","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1ess3","text":"If the goal is metagenomic sequencing, we recommend bypassing the mortar and pestle step. Simply suspend the samples in 1 ml of ZymoBIOMICS™ Lysis Solution, shake vigorously or vortex, and transfer 750 uL of the supernatant to  a ZR BashingBead™ Lysis Tube (0.1 \u0026 0.5 mm) and proceed to Step 2.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"o763","text":"Label the following:","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ajcv9","text":"    ZR BashingBeadTM Lysis Tubes (0.1 \u0026 0.5 mm)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":18,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6onpb","text":"    ZymoSpinTM III-F Filter in Collection Tube","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":12,"length":3}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3u6bk","text":"    Collection Tube","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"178c8","text":"    ZymoSpinTM II-CR Column in Collection Tube","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":12,"length":3}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aemqp","text":"    ZymoSpinTM III-HRC Filter in Collection Tube","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":12,"length":3}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3243g","text":"    2 Sets of 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tubes (not provided with kit)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3m3ht","text":"Spin the labelled ZR BashingBeadTM Lysis Tubes (0.1 \u0026 0.5 mm) for 10 seconds in a mini-centrifuge to ensure that the beads have settled at the bottom","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":32,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b5c3t","text":"Include 1 control per batch and assign its position randomly.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"8l62r","text":"Handle liquid nitrogen with proper training and PPE","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"bsgie","text":"ZymoBIOMICS DNA Extraction Kit","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fsmut","text":"Fecal samples","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b6q76","text":"Mortar and pestle","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8qtbg","text":"Liquid nitrogen","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cjh8d","text":"Ice box with dry ice","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"enebl","text":"1.5 ml microcentrifuge tubes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fdbq9","text":"Vortex","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ca33v","text":"Omni Bead Ruptor Elite bead beater","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1qj61","text":"Centrifuge","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Secure in a Omni Bead Ruptor Elite bead beater fitted with a 2 ml tube holder assembly and process at max speed (30 m/s) for 00:05:00 . Rest for 00:05:00 .
Centrifuge the ZR BashingBead™ Lysis Tubes (0.1 & 0.5 mm) in a microcentrifuge at ≥ 10000 x g, °C, 1 minute .
Transfer up to 600 µL supernatant to the Zymo-Spin™ III-F Filter in the labelled Collection Tube and centrifuge at 8.000 x g, , 1 minute . Discard the Zymo-Spin™ III-F Filter.
Add 600 µL of ZymoBIOMICS™ DNA Binding Buffer to the filtrate in the labelled Collection Tube from Step 4. Mix well.
Repeat Step 5 so that the final volume of ZymoBIOMICS™ DNA Binding Buffer added is 1200 µL .
Transfer 800 µL of the mixture from Step 5 to a Zymo-Spin™ IICR Column in a Collection Tube and centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute .
Discard the flow through from the Collection Tube and repeat Step 6.
Add 400 µL ZymoBIOMICS™ DNA Wash Buffer 1 to the Zymo-Spin™ IICR Column in a new Collection Tube and centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute . Discard the flow-through.
Add 700 µL ZymoBIOMICS™ DNA Wash Buffer 2 to the Zymo-Spin™ IICR Column in a Collection Tube and centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute . Discard the flow-through.
Repeat with 200 µL ZymoBIOMICS™ DNA Wash Buffer 2 to the Zymo-Spin™ IICR Column in a Collection Tube and centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute .

Transfer the Zymo-Spin™ IICR Column to a clean 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube and add 100 µL (50 µl minimum) ZymoBIOMICS™ DNase/RNase Free Water directly to the column matrix and incubate for 00:05:00 . Centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute to elute the DNA
The filtered DNA is now suitable for PCR and other downstream applications. Eluted DNA should be frozen (–30 to –15°C or –90 to –65°C)
Place a Zymo-Spin™ III-HRC Filter in a new Collection Tube and add 600 µL ZymoBIOMICS™ HRC Prep Solution. Centrifuge at 8.000 x g, , 3 minutes .
Transfer the eluted DNA (Step 10) to a prepared Zymo-Spin™ III-HRC Filter in a clean 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube and centrifuge at exactly 16.000 x g, , 3 minutes .

Take 250 mg of food sample while on dry ice and transfer to mortar. Add liquid nitrogen until food sample is completely immersed. Using pestle vigorously homogenize sample until a powder forms. Transfer all of the sample to a ZR BashingBead™ Lysis Tube (0.1 & 0.5 mm) . Add 750 µL ZymoBIOMICS™ Lysis Solution to the tube. Cap tightly.
creator: Genetic Heritage Group NYU Abu Dhabi
